entries.claim: Fresh #725 host gates were captured against the current release-closeout branch.
entries.command: cargo +1.95.0 fmt --all --check && node --check gui/webui/src/app.js && cargo +1.95.0 clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo +1.95.0 test --workspace --no-fail-fast && python3 tools/check_traceability.py && python3 tools/check_evidence.py && python3 tools/check_workflow_pins.py && git diff --check origin/dev...HEAD
entries.evidence: All listed host gates passed; see the captured log for exact command output.

entries.claim: The local Android debug build path used for device evidence builds and test-compiles successfully.
entries.evidence: Gradle build was successful; debug APK SHA256 is 8f2c3f23e3f7b2cbde7342f24b8211ec6d2b02a65fba50eaee047599744915f7.

entries.claim: The edited workflow files still satisfy the immutable GitHub Actions pin policy.
entries.evidence: workflow action pins: 126 action refs checked; OK - every external workflow action is pinned to a commit SHA.

entries.claim: Pixel 8 Pro Mode 1/2/3 target evidence was captured, with full PASS only for online, mode persistence, and sync lazy-cache rows.
entries.command: Pixel 8 Pro CDP probe plus run-as filesystem checks under device-lock om-725
entries.evidence: Rows A/B/C pass; Row D materialization is present but airplane-mode and writeback remain blocked without USB ADB.

entries.claim: Mobile upload, replace, and root upload worked end-to-end and all Graph fixtures were reverted.
entries.command: Mobile bridge upload/replace/root-upload probe with Graph content verification and cleanup
entries.evidence: Graph body hashes and parent IDs match; replace changed eTag; root upload parent matched drive root; cleanup returned 204.

entries.claim: Mobile share-link creation produced a Graph permission that was verified and deleted; invite was deliberately skipped without a controlled recipient.
entries.command: Mobile bridge share-link probe with Graph permissions verification and delete_permission cleanup
entries.evidence: One matching link permission was found and deleted; raw share URL was redacted to a SHA-256 hash.

entries.claim: Android debug package at-rest sentinel scan found no plaintext sentinel in private archive/cache/sync roots.
entries.evidence: Scanner reported PASS; store header was not plaintext SQLite; no plaintext sentinel was found in files/archive, files/cache, files/sync, or cache.

entries.claim: Default debug APK exposes no general app UID TCP listener and uses the WebView message bridge path.
entries.evidence: Probe passed bridge, monkeypatched fetch/EventSource, no-cookie, native validation, BiometricPrompt, and empty UID LISTEN checks.
